sourcesContent:
let InfoP=[
    {gname:'Kalyan Naicker',
     about:`A passionate Front-end Developer and UI Designer focused on creating modern, responsive, and user-friendly digital experiences. I enjoy turning ideas into visually appealing and functional websites that not only look great but also provide smooth and engaging user interactions. With a strong eye for design and attention to detail, I combine creativity with clean code to build interfaces that are both attractive and efficient. My goal is to create meaningful web experiences that leave a lasting impression`,
     Ido:`I design websites front-end, with the the UI that people see.
           I work hard and take my time so I can deliver an amazing product for our clients`,
     github:'https://github.com/DewaldBakker',
     linkedin:'https://www.linkedin.com/in/dewald-bakker-b498403b2/'
    }
]
export default InfoP
